## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📡 New connector (new data source integration)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / Code quality
- [ ] 🧪 Test update

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (Black + Ruff for Python, ESLint for TS)
- [ ] I've added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`PYTHONPATH=src pytest tests/unit -v`)
- [ ] TypeScript type check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
